---
name: quick-reference
description: Describe when to use this prompt
---

<!-- Tip: Use /create-prompt in chat to generate content with agent assistance -->

"""
1. Create a file named <index>_<topic>.md under Quick-Reference Directory.
2. Update documentation with definition, summary, flow diagrams and examples where applicable which are simple to read and understand.
3. The documment Must focus on What, Why, When and How of the topic.
4. The document MUST be concise and to the point, providing a quick reference guide for the topic.
5. The document MUST be structured with clear headings and sections for easy navigation.
6. The document MUST focus on technical interview aspects.
7. The document MUST be reviewed and updated regularly to ensure accuracy and relevance.
"""
